task_completion.description: Verify the PI program for M44 was executed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the KStars/Ekos capture module showing a completed sequence for M44, or a file manager window displaying approximately 10 FITS files generated for the M44 target.

task_completion.description: Verify the PI program for NGC 2392 was executed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the KStars/Ekos capture module showing a completed sequence for NGC 2392, or a file manager window displaying approximately 6 FITS files generated for the NGC 2392 target.

task_completion.description: Verify the PI program for M51 was executed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the KStars/Ekos capture module showing a completed sequence for M51, or a file manager window displaying approximately 8 FITS files generated for the M51 target.

task_completion.description: Verify the final sky view was captured and saved to the correct location.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an image file named 'final_sky.png' in the '~/Images/queue/' directory, visible in a file manager or opened in an image viewer showing a starfield/sky view.

task_completion.description: Verify the session log was created with the correct targets.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text file named 'session_log.txt' in the '~/Documents/' directory, opened in a text editor, explicitly mentioning the three observed targets: M44, NGC 2392, and M51.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent actually used KStars/Ekos to capture the images.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check for screenshots showing the KStars GUI, Ekos observatory control panel, or INDI control panel being actively used, rather than just terminal commands creating dummy files.

integrity.description: Ensure the final sky view is a genuine capture from the software.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'final_sky.png' should look like a screenshot of the KStars sky map or a FITS viewer, not a generic downloaded image or an empty file.

integrity.description: Ensure the session log is a genuine summary and not just a copy-paste of the task description.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'session_log.txt' should be formatted as a log or summary of actions taken, rather than containing the exact prompt text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The observing queue requires three specific targets: M44 (requires 10 total exposures across B and V filters), NGC 2392 (requires 6 total exposures across Ha and OIII filters), and M51 (requires 8 total exposures across Luminance and R filters). The final sky view must be saved exactly to ~/Images/queue/final_sky.png. The session log must be saved to ~/Documents/session_log.txt and explicitly mention M44, NGC 2392, and M51.
